title: Dark mode for the web dashboard
description: Customers have asked for a dark theme option for the web dashboard to reduce eye strain during long work sessions.

title: Bulk editing for tasks
description: Ability to select multiple tasks and change status, assignee, or due date in one action.

title: Custom notification digest schedule
description: Let users choose a daily or weekly digest time instead of receiving notifications immediately.

title: Export reports to Excel with formatting
description: Export workspace reports directly to Excel with charts and formatting preserved, not just raw CSV.

title: Single sign-on with Okta
description: Enterprise customers requested SSO login support via Okta.

title: Two-way sync with Jira
description: Sync tasks bidirectionally between FlowHub and Jira issues.

title: Usage-based billing option
description: An alternative to flat subscription tiers based on active seats per month.

title: Offline mode for mobile app
description: Allow viewing and editing tasks in the mobile app without an internet connection, syncing later.

title: Recurring tasks and task templates
description: Create tasks that repeat on a schedule and save templates for common task types.

title: Custom dashboard widgets
description: Let users build and arrange their own dashboard widgets instead of a fixed layout.

title: Slack thread replies for task comments
description: Post task comment replies as threaded replies in Slack instead of new messages.

title: Multi-currency invoicing
description: Generate invoices in the customer's local currency instead of USD only.
